description: Transparent dispatch log emitted by himotoki_dispatch when a composed request is transmitted through the target's declared channel (ADR-2605302130 §3). CONSTITUTIONAL: dispatch is permitted ONLY against a G14-verified disclosureTarget (`verificationStatus` >= maintainer-verified and within freshness window). The dispatch is TRANSPARENT and IDENTIFIED (G4) — `requesterDid` is the true requester; NO pretext/sockpuppet. himotoki transmits a LAWFUL request through an OFFICIAL channel only (G10); it never circumvents access controls.

targetCid.description: CID of the disclosureTarget the request was sent to

channelDetail.description: Redacted channel detail (e.g. portal confirmation id, postal tracking) — no PII

verificationStatusAtDispatch.description: G14: MUST be a verified status; `unverified-seed` is unrepresentable here (dispatch refused upstream)

feeJpyPaid.description: Fee paid for this request, if any
